yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Synology_DiskStation_Manager_Vulnerabili {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Synology DiskStation Manager Vulnerability Allow Remote Attackers to Execute Arb"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "DiskStation" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Silver_Fox_Abuses_Stolen_EV_Certificates {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Silver Fox Abuses Stolen EV Certificates in AtlasCross RAT Malware Campaign"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-RU-02" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "AtlasCross" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Researchers_release_tool_to_detect_steal {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Researchers release tool to detect stealthy BPFDoor implants in critical infrast"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-CN-01" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_GlassWorm_attack_installs_fake_browser_e {

        date = "2026-03-26"

        $kw0 = "GlassWorm" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

}

    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2018-25210 - WebOfisi E-Ticaret 4.0 SQL Injection via urun Parameter"

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 117 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 63 as HIGH risk. 28 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Address 28 CISA KEV-listed vulnerabilities under active exploitation
Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
